MINI MINUTES: Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Cassia Smith.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Angela R. Leonard is present.
Attorney Rob Berry representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jonathan Polland, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of April 29, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
